entries.title: Navigation menu collapse to "more"
entries.summary: Reorganized the navigation to hide secondary items behind a "more" dropdown on smaller screens. Keeps the header cleaner without sacrificing access to anything.

entries.title: Automated changelog tracking
entries.summary: Set up a system to automatically generate changelog entries from git commits. Now when I commit with a special format, the changelog page updates without manual editing.

entries.title: Error pages redesigned
entries.summary: Redesigned the 404 and error pages to be more useful and hopefully a bit less sad to land on. They're not just a dead end anymore.

entries.title: Fixed older card truncation
entries.summary: Older blog post cards were getting cut off. Quick one-liner fix in the BlogPost component.

entries.title: Navigation between blog posts
entries.summary: Added prev/next post links at the bottom of blog posts so you can browse through the archive without going back to the index.

entries.title: Toast notification component
entries.summary: Added a toast component that shows when you copy your email. It's a small detail but makes the copy-to-clipboard action feel more responsive.

entries.title: Error states for API failures
entries.summary: Added proper error handling across GitHub, Spotify, and Strava integrations so pages don't break when API calls fail.

entries.title: Improved error reporting in Sentry
entries.summary: Refactored error handling to get better insights into what's actually breaking. Instrument initialization changes should help surface more useful stack traces.

entries.title: Added Sentry error tracking
entries.summary: Set up Sentry across multiple API endpoints for better error monitoring and debugging. Now tracking issues on the GitHub, Spotify, Strava, and OG image generation endpoints.

entries.title: Added error tracking with Sentry
entries.summary: Set up Sentry to catch and monitor runtime errors on the site. Now I'll actually know when things break in production.

entries.title: Fixed chunk load errors
entries.summary: After deploying with code splitting, the site was crashing when loading certain chunks. Added error handling to catch and display these failures gracefully instead of just breaking the page.

entries.title: Fixed running page loading state
entries.summary: The Running page was showing a loading indicator at the wrong time. Fixed the timing so it only appears while data is actually being fetched.

entries.title: RSS feed for blog posts
entries.summary: Added an RSS feed so you can subscribe to new blog posts with your favorite reader. It's automatically generated when the site builds.

entries.title: Removed orange dots from pages
entries.summary: Cleaned up some visual elements that were scattered across the site. They seemed to be lingering from an earlier design iteration and weren't doing much.

entries.title: Gradient titles everywhere
entries.summary: Made page titles consistently use gradient styling across the site instead of mixing different styles.

entries.title: Added contributions to cmdk
entries.summary: Built and integrated a command palette component using the cmdk library, adding keyboard-driven navigation to the site.

entries.title: GitHub contributions loading state
entries.summary: Added a loading state for the GitHub contributions section so it doesn't look broken while fetching data.

entries.title: GitHub contributions on homepage
entries.summary: Added a live widget that shows my GitHub contributions graph on the home page. It pulls data from the GitHub API and displays the last year of activity.

entries.title: Mobile navigation actually works now
entries.summary: Rewrote the mobile nav component because it was kind of broken. Should be more reliable on smaller screens now.

entries.title: Added Strava running stats
entries.summary: Integrated Strava API to pull running activity data. New /running page shows stats, maps, and activity details fetched directly from Strava.

entries.title: Now playing loading state
entries.summary: Added a loading indicator to the now playing section while spotify data is being fetched, so it doesn't just sit there blank.

entries.title: Simplified map component logic
entries.summary: Refactored the WorldMap component to load more efficiently, cutting the code size roughly in half while keeping the same functionality.

entries.title: Command palette improvements
entries.summary: Fixed some bugs in the command palette and tweaked the styling. It should feel more responsive now.

entries.title: Spotify fallback to recently played
entries.summary: Now playing widget now shows your most recently played track if nothing's currently playing, so you'll always see something instead of a blank state.

entries.title: Fixed duplicate Spotify API polling
entries.summary: Was hitting the Spotify API twice per poll interval. Refactored the polling logic to centralize it in App.tsx so the data flows down to components instead of each one requesting independently.

entries.title: Now playing widget
entries.summary: Built a new component that shows what I'm currently listening to. Hooked it up to pull live data and styled it to fit the site.

entries.title: Added world map and now playing widget
entries.summary: Built out a bunch of new features including an interactive world map, a now playing component that integrates with Spotify, and added travel data tracking. Also set up the auth scripts needed to keep everything connected.

entries.title: Added map units data
entries.summary: Built a script to generate map unit data and added it to the public assets. This powers whatever map feature is being built.

entries.title: Added open graph image generation
entries.summary: Built a dynamic OG image generator so posts get nice preview cards when shared on social media or messaging apps.

entries.title: Added Vercel analytics
entries.summary: Integrated Vercel's analytics to track visitor data and see what content folks are actually checking out.

entries.title: Limited posts on home page
entries.summary: The home page now only shows the most recent posts instead of everything. Should keep things snappier as the archive grows.

entries.title: Timeline now has animations
entries.summary: Added fade-in and stagger animations to the timeline component. Each event now animates in as the page loads, making it feel a bit more polished.

entries.title: Added dissertation PDF
entries.summary: Published my dissertation as a downloadable PDF on the site. It's about 1.4 MB, so fair warning if you're on a slow connection.

entries.title: Mobile navigation fixed
entries.summary: The mobile nav wasn't working properly on smaller screens. Got that sorted out.

entries.title: Complete website redesign
entries.summary: Migrated from Next.js to a Vite-based React setup. New design with command palette, improved navigation, and simplified architecture overall.

entries.title: Added incident.io to timeline
entries.summary: Updated the timeline to include incident.io, documenting another tool or service I've been working with.

entries.title: Updated bio to mention incident.io
entries.summary: Added incident.io to my bio. Currently working there and thought it deserved a mention.

entries.title: Fixed text selection color
entries.summary: The text selection highlight now uses the right color. It was bothering me more than it probably should have.

entries.title: Added CV as downloadable PDF
entries.summary: Added a CV PDF to the site so people can download my résumé. Handy for when folks want something more formal than what's on the main site.

entries.title: Made timeline logos clickable
entries.summary: The company and project logos on the timeline now link to their websites. Makes it easier to jump around and check things out.

entries.title: Timeline and author section updates
entries.summary: Updated the timeline component with more details and refreshed the author section with a new photo.

entries.title: Supabase pausing prevention guide
entries.summary: Published a blog post about preventing Supabase projects from pausing during inactivity, including strategies to keep free-tier projects alive.

entries.title: Blog posts now statically cached
entries.summary: Removed the force dynamic setting from blog posts, which means they'll be statically generated and cached instead of regenerated on every request.

entries.title: RSC streaming with Suspense
entries.summary: Added streaming for React Server Components on blog posts using Suspense. The like button now loads independently without blocking the page.

entries.title: Prevent Supabase project from pausing
entries.summary: Added a health check endpoint that pings the API regularly, keeping the Supabase project active so it doesn't go idle.

entries.title: Fixed hydration mismatch with localStorage
entries.summary: Added a ClientOnly wrapper component to prevent Next.js hydration errors when accessing localStorage. This fixes the like button on blog posts.

entries.title: Set metadata base URL
entries.summary: Fixed the base URL in page metadata so social share previews and canonical links work correctly.

entries.title: Post likes feature
entries.summary: Added the ability to like blog posts. Each post now has a heart button that persists likes to the database.

entries.title: Set up local development database
entries.summary: Added Docker Compose setup for a local dev database so I can develop offline without hitting external services.

entries.title: Added metadata to blog posts
entries.summary: Blog posts now include metadata like publish date and reading time. Makes each post feel a bit more intentional.

entries.title: Wrote about rendering rich markdown tables
entries.summary: Added a post on rendering rich markdown table cells with custom components. Includes some experiments with handling complex content inside markdown tables.

entries.title: Markdown emoji support
entries.summary: Added support for markdown emojis in posts and pages. Now you can use :smile: and similar shortcuts instead of pasting unicode directly.

entries.title: Made blog text smaller
entries.summary: Dialed down the font size on blog posts. It was a bit too large.

entries.title: Fixed inline code styling
entries.summary: Tweaked the Tailwind config to fix how inline code looks throughout the site. Nothing major, just making sure it's consistent.

entries.title: Fixed layout width issue
entries.summary: The main layout was rendering wider than intended on some screens. Tweaked the width constraints in the layout component to fix it.

entries.title: Added typed route validation
entries.summary: Set up Next.js typed routes to catch route mismatches at compile time. Should prevent a whole class of link-breaking bugs.

entries.title: Added Web Vitals monitoring
entries.summary: Integrated a speed insights library to track Core Web Vitals. Mostly curious to see how the site actually performs in the wild rather than just in local dev.

entries.title: Added analytics tracking
entries.summary: Set up analytics on the site to start tracking visitor behavior and page performance.

entries.title: Updated downsizing post
entries.summary: Expanded the downsizing post with more content and thoughts on the topic. Added a few more sections and refined existing material.

entries.title: Images now zoom on hover
entries.summary: Added a little hover effect to blog post grid images so they scale up slightly. Makes the grid feel more interactive.

entries.title: Show unpublished posts in dev
entries.summary: Unpublished posts now show up when running the site locally, making it easier to draft and preview content before publishing.

entries.title: Draft post support
entries.summary: Added a drafts system so I can publish posts-in-progress without them showing up on the blog yet. Currently working on posts about downsizing and a fake GPT thing.

entries.title: Fixed mobile layout issues
entries.summary: Tweaked some spacing and sizing on the homepage and talk list components to look better on smaller screens.

entries.title: Now playing auto-refreshes
entries.summary: The now playing widget updates automatically in the background instead of requiring a page refresh to see what I'm listening to.

entries.title: Updated Nx talk content
entries.summary: Updated the content and details for the Nx monorepo talk, including minor tweaks to how it's displayed on the site.

entries.title: Extracted social icons component
entries.summary: Pulled social media icons out into a reusable component. Now used in both the footer and author bio section.

entries.title: Fixed stale Spotify data
entries.summary: The site was sometimes showing outdated Spotify listening data. Added a cache invalidation to make sure it refreshes properly.

entries.title: Added talks section
entries.summary: Built out a speaking page with individual talk pages. Added a new talk about building maintainable JavaScript monorepos with Nx.

entries.title: Extracted Timeline component
entries.summary: Moved timeline rendering logic out of the main page into its own component to keep things cleaner.

entries.title: Now playing widget
entries.summary: Added a now playing widget powered by Spotify API that shows what I'm currently listening to in the footer.

entries.title: Added about the author box
entries.summary: Blog posts now have a little bio box at the bottom so people know who's writing these things.
